profile.pageDescription: Signed in as {name}. Manage your profile, teams, and invitations.

profile.photoHint: JPEG, PNG, or WebP up to 2MB.
profile.usernameHint: Used for sign in and mentions. Must be unique. Lowercase is recommended.
profile.photoUploaded: Photo uploaded. Save changes to apply it.
profile.activeTeamsLimitWarning: You reached the active team limit. Leave a team before accepting another invite.
profile.noActiveTeams: You are not an active member of any team yet.

security.sectionDescription: Change your password and keep your account secure.
security.passwordHint: At least 10 characters and include at least 1 letter and 1 number.
security.setPasswordDescription: You're using {providers} login. Set a password to enable email/password login.

packs.title: Packs
packs.pageDescription: Create and manage quiz packs, rounds, and question sets.
packs.searchPlaceholder: Search packs by title or description

createDialog.title: Create pack
createDialog.description: Create a quiz pack and configure rounds next.

delete.confirmDescription: This permanently removes the pack, rounds, questions, and linked options/media mappings.

packs.notAuthorizedDescription: You do not have access to this pack.
packs.roundNotAuthorizedDescription: You do not have access to this round.
packs.roundBuilderDescription: Build questions for this round. Question type is selected per question.

settings.timersSubtitle: Question timer preset and write answers time.

empty.title: No packs yet
empty.description: Create your first pack to start building rounds and questions.

packs.emptyRoundsDescription: Add your first round to start building the pack.
packs.deleteRoundDescriptionWithName: This will remove "{title}" and all questions in this round.

template.overwriteDescription: This will overwrite existing rounds in this pack with the standard Zakovat {count}-round template.

appHome.title: Control panel
appHome.description: Track quiz production, jump into core actions, and continue editing your latest packs.

profile.description: Update account details and security settings.

recent.title: Recent packages

settingsPage.title: Settings
settingsPage.placeholder: Account and workspace settings will be added here.

auth.loginDescription: Sign in to manage quizzes, assets, and workspace settings.
auth.loginUnavailable: Unable to sign in right now.
auth.signupDescription: Set up your workspace and start building quizzes in minutes.
auth.name: Name
auth.signupUnavailable: Unable to create account right now.
auth.googleLoginFailed: Google sign in is temporarily unavailable.
auth.googleStateInvalid: Google sign in validation failed. Please try again.
auth.telegramLoginFailed: Telegram sign in is temporarily unavailable.
auth.telegramStateInvalid: Telegram sign in validation failed. Please try again.

error.tooManyAttempts: Too many sign in attempts. Please try again later.

validation.fixFields: Please fix the highlighted fields and try again.

identifier.invalid: Enter a valid username or email.

email.taken: This email is already in use.

username.tooShort: Username must be at least 3 characters.
username.tooLong: Username must be at most 24 characters.
username.invalid: Use only lowercase letters, numbers, dots, or underscores.
username.invalidEdge: Username cannot start or end with a dot or underscore.
username.consecutive: Username cannot contain consecutive dots or underscores.

password.tooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
password.tooLong: Password must be at most 72 characters.
password.edgeSpaces: Password cannot start or end with a space.
password.missingLetter: Password must include at least one letter.
password.missingNumber: Password must include at least one number.

name.tooShort: Name must be at least 2 characters.
name.tooLong: Name must be at most 64 characters.
name.invalid: Use letters, spaces, apostrophes, or hyphens.

login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Choose your preferred sign-in method to continue to Zakovat Quiz Creator.

signup.title: Create your account
signup.subtitle: Start with one tap provider auth or finish account setup with email.

misc.termsNotice: By continuing, you agree to our Terms and Privacy policy.

info.signupDisabled: No sign-up needed. Continue with Telegram or Google.

benefits.fastAccess: Access your workspace in seconds with secure sign in.
benefits.workspaceSync: Keep packs, media, and team progress in sync across devices.
benefits.secureSession: Rely on stable sessions built for live production workflows.
benefits.privacyNote: Privacy: we never post anything via Telegram or Google without your permission.

visual.phoneSubtitle: Fast mobile-friendly access for live game operations.
visual.phoneHelper: Use Telegram or Google for the quickest secure login.

desktop.title: Approve sign in with your phone
desktop.subtitle: Scan this one-time QR code and confirm on your phone.
desktop.securityNote: Only approve this sign in if you started it on your desktop.
desktop.error: Unable to check QR status right now.
desktop.consumeError: Confirmation received, but desktop sign in failed. Try again.
desktop.expiresIn: Expires in {count, plural, one {# second} other {# seconds}}

mobile.title: Continue sign in
mobile.subtitle: Choose a provider and approve desktop sign in.
mobile.invalidToken: Invalid or missing QR token. Please scan again from desktop.

finish.approvedSubtitle: You can return to your desktop now.
finish.expiredSubtitle: Scan a new QR code from your desktop login page.
finish.invalidSubtitle: QR token was not found. Please scan again.

presenter.title: Presenter
presenter.description: Prepare to run the live presentation.

landing.brandTagline: Build professional quizzes with your team
landing.heroTitle: Create quiz experiences quickly and run them with confidence
landing.heroDescription: Manage rounds, questions, and media in one workspace designed for live game workflows.
landing.heroPanelLineOne: Structure rounds and questions with clarity.
landing.heroPanelLineTwo: Collaborate with your team in one place.
landing.heroPanelLineThree: Prepare quickly for live presenter sessions.
landing.featuresDescription: Minimal, practical tools for faster quiz delivery.

featureOne.title: Fast pack setup
featureOne.description: Create a new quiz pack and start building rounds in minutes.

featureTwo.title: Flexible question formats
featureTwo.description: Handle text, image, audio, and other question types in one flow.

featureThree.title: Team collaboration
featureThree.description: Work together with clear roles and better review control.

featureFour.title: Presenter-ready workflow
featureFour.description: Prepare your pack and move into live presentation mode smoothly.

landing.howDescription: Launch your quiz in three practical steps.

stepOne.title: Create your account
stepOne.description: Sign up and configure your workspace once.

stepTwo.title: Build your pack
stepTwo.description: Add rounds, write questions, and attach media assets.

stepThree.title: Run with your team
stepThree.description: Review everything and launch your live session from the dashboard.
